nasb.text: To his father he sent as follows: ten donkeys loaded with the best things of Egypt, and ten female donkeys loaded with grain and bread and sustenance for his father on the journey.

esv.text: To his father he sent as follows: ten donkeys loaded with the good things of Egypt, and ten female donkeys loaded with grain, bread, and provision for his father on the journey.

cnv.text: 約瑟送去給他父親的，有公驢十頭，載著埃及美好的產物，以及母驢十頭，載著五穀、餅和給他父親在路上用的食物。

ccb.text: 约瑟送给父亲十头公驴，驮着埃及的美物，还送了十头母驴，驮着粮食、饼和其他食物，让父亲路上用。

csbs.text: 约瑟送给他父亲公驴十匹，驮着埃及的美物；母驴十匹，驮着五谷、饼，以及他父亲路上用的食物。
